Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Urg’naut]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Urg’naut works for a peace he defines as nonexistence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — There is a ruined city over Urg’naut’s corpse.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Urg’naut is a creature Shera cursed Meia to be devoured by.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Urg’naut is a place associated with darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Urg’naut is a being that can be sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Urg'naut wants to destroy the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Urg’naut is a threat that could devour the planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Urg’naut is a being that some believe people might be fed to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Urg’naut is a Great Elder who may be actively evil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Urg’naut is associated with shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Urg’naut pursues absolute nothingness.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Urg'naut's prison is located to the east.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Urg'naut has an endless and insatiable hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The servant of Urg'naut has been driven off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — One of the newcomers has a head shrouded in remnants of Urg'naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Urg'naut is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Urg'naut and his spawn do not kill or attack; they cause people to cease to exist.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Calder Marten is a spawn of Urg'naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Urg'naut is a being that can find Calder in the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Urg’naut is known as the Creeping Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Urg’naut is a silhouette of solid shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Urg'naut is described as a dangerous ally who will seek the end.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Urg'naut is an entity whose stirring affects the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Urg’naut has been released.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Urg’naut is described as the darkness at the end of all things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Urg’naut's presence is felt as a passive Intent of distant and alien malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Urg'naut is a Great Elder who can approach the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Urg'naut attempts to take a host by slithering into a person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Calder turned his focus back to Urg’naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Urg’naut is the embodiment of death and absence, represented by infinite shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Urg'naut is facing down Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Urg'naut possesses a body with a face that is a black sun, an endless hole.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Urg’naut is a Great Elder who can withdraw his shadow into a twisting column.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Urg’naut is a Great Elder who can destroy the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Urg’naut is free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Urg’naut's shadow resembles a seething nest of twisting serpents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Urg'naut is a place that causes dread and horror.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Urg’naut attacked the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Urg’naut took human form and escaped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Urg'naut is associated with a primal fear and emptiness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Someone is fighting Urg’naut in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac's words brought up memories of Urg’naut’s emptiness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Urg'naut is a threat that can devour thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The embodied Urg’naut is extremely mighty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac showed Jerri what happened with Urg’naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Urg'naut won.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder's memory of seeing Urg'naut was fresh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Urg’naut possessed a human body and erased ten percent of the Capital.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Urg’naut can be subtle and tilts minds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen invokes Urg’naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Urg’naut is a location that Loreli once pierced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Urg’naut is coming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Urg’naut is the Great Elder of Annihilation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Urg’naut wants to save people from pain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Urg’naut is a Great Elder that spoke to Darius Allbright.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Urg’naut is a Great Elder who promised Darius unending rest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Urg'naut whispered that they bring annihilation to all things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Urg’naut ascended into the void to meet the Outsider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Urg’naut is fighting an opponent of impossible power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Urg’naut escaped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Calder did not overhear Urg'naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Urg’naut is fighting the Outsider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera stated that Urg’naut won.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Urg’naut has departed.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
